name: expedia
description: Plan trips and book hotels, flights, rental cars, and vacation packages with Expedia.

interface.shortDescription: Plan trips and book travel with Expedia
interface.longDescription: Search hotels, flights, rental cars, cruises, and vacation packages, compare options, and move from trip planning to booking with Expedia inside ChatGPT.
defaultPrompt: Find me family-friendly hotels in Tokyo for a week in July
